testcase.name: productBrandNameTest
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//div[contains(@class,'product-brands')]"} (Session info: testcase.name: productimageCount

failure.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of all elements located by By.xpath: //div[@class='product-images-list']//li (tried for 6000 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval)
